arts.ttl: Report: Worry for Liverpool as Real Madrid line up €100m double transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool may reportedly be in danger of missing out on two of their top transfer targets as Real Madrid also want both players. The players in question are Bournemouth’s talented young defensive duo Dean Huijsen and Milos Kerkez. CaughtOffside understands that Liverpool have already started some early talks over possibly signing Hungarian left-back Kerkez from […] The post Report: Worry for Liverpool as Real Madrid line up €100m double transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.
